fair_value_today.basis: base case (Metis) intrinsic value — the anchor, not a weighted blend

fair_value_12m.basis: #1 rolled forward at r=9.0% less dividend 0.0

detail.multiple_rationale: Our SOTP yields ~$45.50/share intrinsic. Rolled forward at r=10.2% (blended WACC): #3 = $50.15. The bear case evidence (Infineon 200mm ramp observable, impairments DOCUMENTED) is OBSERVABLE-AND-NEAR per Theia, which per METHODS.md moves the target slightly below #3. Target = $50 (barely below #3; not a dramatic lean because the bull design-win evidence is EXTRAPOLATED, a real offsetting force). The $50 target corresponds to ~10x NTM EBITDA. Mature semis trade 12-18x EV/EBITDA but on NORMALIZED (not recovery-year) EBITDA. At recovery-year EBITDA of ~$1.85B and 10x multiple, EV = $18.5B, equity = $17.6B, price = $45.30/sh. The gap to #4 ($50) reflects one year's value creation at our WACC.

conviction.label: MEDIUM
conviction.basis: action SELL: Daedalus assigned MEDIUM (evidence read across base/bull/bear) -> MEDIUM

sensitivity_matrix.description: The two crux levers: PSG FY2030 revenue (SiC recovery level) x PSG EBIT margin (fab utilization recovery). AMG and ISG held at base.
sensitivity_matrix.dominant_lever: PSG FY2030 revenue (SiC recovery). Moving from bear $2.65B to bull $7.08B at same margin = 2.1-3.0x value swing. Revenue is the dominant lever.
sensitivity_matrix.second_order: ROIC in the Gordon formula is second-order (changing 20% to 30% = ~14% change in multiple = ~5-7% in FV). EBIT margin is second-order to revenue.
sensitivity_matrix.matrix_note: Rows = PSG EBIT margin. Columns = PSG FY2030 revenue. Current price $121.62 is far above all cells. Even the bull-bull ($7.08B rev, 28% margin) yields only $61.1/share -- half the current price. The market is not using intrinsic NOPAT valuation.
sensitivity_matrix.current_price_context: To justify $121.62 at our Gordon multiple (13.67x EV/NOPAT) requires total company NOPAT of $3.21B = $21.2B revenue at 18% margin. That is 2.3x the total company bull case FY2030 revenue ($9.19B) and exceeds the total projected global SiC device market by 2030.

bridge_logic: #1 fair value today 45.53 -> #3 fair value 12m 49.63 (x(1+0.090) - div 0.0); #4 target 12m 45.35 (defensible_multiple); implied return to #4 = -62.7%, to #3 = -59.2%, to street mean None = None%
